next_steps: Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for comprehensive infectious workup (PJP DFA, GMS stain, AFB smear/culture/NAAT, fungal culture, CMV PCR)
Send serum (1,3)-beta-D-glucan and serum Histoplasma antigen
Send serum Cryptococcal antigen and blood cultures for mycobacteria and fungi
Continue broad-spectrum empiric antimicrobial coverage for PJP and bacterial pneumonia
Monitor for clinical deterioration requiring mechanical ventilation and adjuvant corticosteroids if PJP is confirmed
Delay antiretroviral therapy initiation until opportunistic infections are ruled out or initial treatment is underway to minimize IRIS risk
